overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a foggy rural area at night, passing a corrugated metal structure and a house with an illuminated porch before entering dark woods. The atmosphere is tense and ominous with low visibility and misty conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path alongside corrugated metal building

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the metal wall toward the outdoor seating area visible ahead

entered.detail: tall industrial metal siding running parallel to the path
wooden chairs and small table arranged in the grassy yard ahead
uneven grass and dirt surface with scattered leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a corrugated metal wall in a dark, foggy outdoor area. The path is narrow with the wall on the left and open grassy yard on the right, where outdoor furniture is visible in the distance through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential yard with illuminated house porch

events.description: moving from narrow industrial corridor to open residential yard with house
porch lights become visible ahead, casting warm glow in the fog

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the house porch while moving through the grassy yard

entered.detail: covered porch with white support columns and roof overhang
warm glowing lights illuminating the porch area through the fog
metal mesh fencing surrounding the property perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a residential yard, passing the outdoor chairs and approaching a house with an illuminated porch. The chain link fence becomes visible on the right as warm porch lights cut through the fog, creating a focal point in the darkness.

events.description: passing the house and entering the dark wooded area beyond

agents.ego_description: moving past the house into the dense dark woods where visibility decreases significantly

entered.detail: tall trees with thick trunks creating a dark forest canopy
narrow trail leading deeper into the mist-shrouded woods

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the house, the character enters a densely wooded area shrouded in thick fog. The porch lights fade behind as the surroundings become darker and more enclosed by trees, with visibility dropping significantly in the misty forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial perimeter into a dimly lit residential yard and finally into a suffocatingly dark forest. It begins by tracking along a corrugated metal wall in a dark, foggy outdoor area, where a narrow path separates the structure from a misty grassy yard. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into the yard, passing outdoor furniture and approaching a house where warm porch lights cut through the gloom to create a brief focal point. The camera then moves beyond the illuminated porch, causing the warm light to fade as the environment shifts toward a densely wooded area. Finally, the surroundings become increasingly enclosed by trees and thick fog, with visibility dropping significantly as the character disappears into the misty forest.
